title: Mellow Tender Greek Bananas Galaktoboureko
description: A funky, tender Greek dessert featuring bananas, perfect for kids. Cooked in a Korean ttukbaegi earthenware cookware and galaktoboureko form, it's a unique and delicious treat.
instructions: Preheat the kazan (cauldron) over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Melt 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter in the kazan.
In a large bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients (flour, confectioners sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, cardamom).
Add the egg, vanilla extract, and honey to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Peel and slice the bananas, then fold them into the batter until well combined.
Pour the batter into the kazan and cook for 3-4 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Add the full-fat milk and heavy cream to the kazan and stir gently to combine.
Continue cooking for another 4-5 minutes, until the mixture is set and the bananas are tender.
Remove from heat and let cool for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with confectioners sugar and a sprinkle of cinnamon if desired.
Transfer the galaktoboureko to a serving plate and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow it to set.
Once set, slice into wedges and serve chilled.
Enjoy your delicious Mellow Tender Greek Bananas Galaktoboureko!
